# ProgressTracker.Complete method

Removes *token* from the active set once the operation has reached a terminal state (R-15.1.4-g). Safe to call for a token that is not currently tracked. Mirrors TS `complete`.

```csharp
public void Complete(ProgressToken token)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| token | The progress token. |
